name: Sumit Yadav
affiliation: Computer Engineering graduate · Pulchowk Campus, Tribhuvan University, Nepal
bioSummary: Hello! I'm an AI researcher working on the interpretability and safety of language models, and on bringing language technology to Maithili and other under-served languages. I work on AI safety and agentic systems at Astha.ai, write here, and post short explainers on YouTube.
